title: eriastrum densifolium subsp. austromontanum
intro: Eriastrum densifolium subsp. austromontanum, also known as the austromontane eriastrum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bumblebee flower family (Polemoniaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriastrum densifolium subsp. austromontanum include relieving digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used in combination with other medicinal herbs to enhance their effects.
